节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The inputDevice module implements input device management functions such as listening for the connection and disconnection of input devices and querying input device information such as the device name.
Enumerates hot swap events.
Enumerates input source of the axis. For example, if a mouse reports an x-axis event, the input source of the x-axis is the mouse.
Defines the axis type of an input device.
Enumerates keyboard types.
Keyboard without keys.
Keyboard with unknown keys.
Full keyboard.
Keypad.
Stylus.
Remote control.
Enumerates function key types.
CapsLock key. This key can be enabled or disabled only for the input keyboard extension.
Provides hot swap information about an input device.
Device change type, which indicates whether an input device is inserted or removed.
Unique ID of the input device. If a physical device is repeatedly reinstalled or restarted, its ID may change.

Enables listening for device hot swap events. When performing this operation, you need to connect to external devices such as a mouse, keyboard, and touchscreen.
2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { 'change' } type - Event type. This field has a fixed value of change.
@param { Callback<DeviceListener> } listener - Listener for events of the input device.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: Event type. This field has a fixed value of change.
Listener for events of the input device.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

节点.功能描述:
Disables listening for device hot swap events. This API is called before the application exits. If this parameter is left unspecified, listening for hot swap events of all input devices will be canceled.
2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { 'change' } type - Event type. This field has a fixed value of change.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: Event type. This field has a fixed value of change.
Callback to unregister.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

节点.功能描述: Defines the axis range of an input device.
Input source of the axis.
Axis type.
Maximum value of the axis.
Minimum value of the axis.
Fuzzy value of the axis.
Benchmark value of the axis.
Resolution of the axis.
Provides information about an input device.
Unique ID of the input device. If the same physical device is repeatedly reinstalled or restarted, its ID may change.
Name of the input device.

Input sources supported by the input device. An input device can have multiple input sources. For example, if a keyboard is equipped with a touchpad, the input device supports both keyboard and touchpad input capabilities.
Axis information of the input device.
Bus type of the input device. By default, the bus type reported by the input device prevails.
Product information of the input device.
Vendor information of the input device.
Version information of the input device.
Physical address of the input device.
Unique ID of the input device.
Indicates whether the input device is virtual.
Indicates whether the input device is local.
Obtains the IDs of all input devices. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<Array<number>> } callback - Callback used to return the IDs of all input devices.

parameters.说明: Callback used to return the IDs of all input devices.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the IDs of all input devices. This API uses a promise to return the result.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<Array<number>> } Promise used to return the IDs of all input devices.
节点.return_description: Promise used to return the IDs of all input devices.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the interval (including the device sleep time) elapsed since the last system input event. This API uses a promise to return the result.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<number> } Promise used to return the interval since the last input.
节点.return_description: Promise used to return the interval since the last input.

节点.功能描述:
Specifies whether to enable a function key (for example, CapsLock). This API uses a promise to return the result. and the value false indicates the opposite.
2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { FunctionKey } functionKey - Type of the function key.
@param { boolean } enabled - Status of the function key. The value true indicates that the function key is enabled,
@returns { Promise<void> } Returns the result through a promise.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@throws { BusinessError } 3900002 - There is currently no keyboard device connected.
@throws { BusinessError } 3900003 - It is prohibited for non-input applications.

parameters.说明: Type of the function key.
Status of the function key. The value true indicates that the function key is enabled,

节点.return_description: Returns the result through a promise.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
There is currently no keyboard device connected.
It is prohibited for non-input applications.

节点.功能描述:
